embeds.title: Morimens Endgame BUT every time I LOSE I eat Carolina Reaper
embeds.description: Farming D-Tide, Phantasmal Dives, Madness Train and more can get a little samey, so I thought - why not spice it up (literally.) by forcing myself to consume unreasonably extremely spicy Carolina Reaper kimchi (one whole pepper per portion of it by the way) every time I fail to complete an event or
